steps.title: Identify the signal phrase
steps.content: The underlined sentence begins with “For example,” indicating that examples supporting the prior claim about the forests changing the land are coming.

steps.title: Match the function to the choice
steps.content: Choice C captures the function: the examples (reduced erosion, new habitats) illustrate how conditions were altered. A, B, and D either misidentify the purpose or invent unsupported claims. That matches choice C — C is correct.
